info.english_meaning: to be unsteadyto wander to roam
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: anavasTAnam = deSAntaragamanam  ' calane Bramati Bramyet  SamAdeH BrAmyati Bramet ' (Slo. 147) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'parAvarajYAstu na samBramanti' (BA॰SAM॰226.14) sadasadvastuvido na trasyantItyAha
'nAsamBramattadA pArTaH' (BA॰droRa॰100.5) asamBramat=samaBramat=paryAkulacitto'BUt
'tyaja SokaM ca mohaM ca samBramaM duHKajaM taTA' (rA॰2.60.5) samBramaScintA
'na tO BayaM samBramamaByupeyataH' (rA॰2.53.35) BayakAryamitastata IkzaRarUpaM samBrama iti tilakaH
'samBrameRa samudAcAro vismftaH' (dUta॰1) samBrameRa=samBrAntena (tvayA)
'gfhamupagate samBramaviDiH' (Bartf॰1.57) samBramaH=AdaraH=satkriyA
'dagDvA samBrAntapOradvijagaRarahitAnnandavaMSaprarohAn' (mudrA॰1.11) samBrAntAH=samBAvitAH samAdftAH
'dfzwvA hanUmato varzma samBrAntaH pavanAtmajaH' (BA॰vana॰150.10) samBrAntaH=kzuBitaH sammUQaH
'tataH paramasamBrAntAH sarzisaNGAH surAsurAH' (rA॰1.60.24) paramasamBrAntAH=atyantaM paryAkulacittAH
'sUcItodEH samBramaSca SastaH' (saSruta0 uttara0 5012) samBramo manasa AkulIkaraRam
'udBramaH samBramaScEva gaRO te paricArakO tavAjYayA karizyete lokasyodBramasamBramO' (mAtsyapu0 18099)
'kvacidudBramate yogAt kvacidviBramate balAt' (rA0 36036)
'vibaBrAma matistAta vinayAdanayA''hatA' (hari0 12529) matiranayA''hatA'nItyA tAqitA vinayAd vibamrAma cacAletyAha
'sa cedrAjanyanekAgro rAjyaviBramaSaNkayA' (rA0 22327) rAjyacalanaSaNkayA rAjyaBraMSaBayena daRqasya viBramAt anyaTA pravartanAt

'nivfttasarvendriyavfttiviBramaH' (BA0 pu0 1931) viBramo'navasTAnam cAYcalyam cittavfttyanavasTAnaM SfNgArAd viBramo Bavet viBramastvarayA'kAle BUzAsTAnaviparyayaH taTA ca kumAre (14) prayogaH--yaScApsaroviBramamaRqanAnAM sampAdayitrIM (DAtumatAM) SiKarErbiBarti
'navapraRayaviBramAkulitamAlatIdfzwayaH' (mAlatI0 938) viBramo vilAsaH
'taraNgasya biBarti viBramam' (nE0 1525) viBramaH SoBA
'yo'Darme DarmaviBramaH' (BA0 pu0 41912) viBramo BrAntiranyaTA grahaH
'UrmivyatikaraviBramapracaRqaH' (mahAvIra0 626) viBramaH kzoBaH
'dIrGamAyuH sa me prAdAttato mAM viBramo'spfSat' (rA0 3719) viBramo darpaH
'yaTA na viBrametsenA taTA nItirviDIyatAm' (BA0 vi0 4723) na viBramet na viGaweta na Bajyeta
'rodane vyADimaByeti hasane deSaviBramam' (mAtsya0 2325) viBramam viplavam
'kvacid udBramate yogAt kvacid viBramate balAt' (rA0 36036) udBramate udBramati utpatati
'udBramAmi virahAt Kalu tasyAH' (nE0 5108) udBramAmi unmAdyAmi
'dfzwvA svapnagataM rAmamudBramAmi vicetanaH' (rA0 33916) udBramAmi BrAntaM pralApaM karomi

'DAvatyudBramati pramIlati patatyudyAti mUrCatyapi' (gIta0 4) udBramati=paryawati kamalasyodBrAntaBfNgasya ca upari Bramanto BfNgA yatra tAdfSasyetyarTaH udBrAntAsiH=BramitaKaqgaH kiYcidudBramyAbravIt udvijyetyarTaH
'udBramanniva vegena vikzipan raGunandanaH' (rA0 3604) udBraman utpatan
'udBramaH saMBramaScEva gaRO te paricArakO tavAjYayA karizyete lokasyodBramasamBramO' (mAtsya0 18099).. udBrama unmAdaH
